<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Helper; /** * Marks a row as being a separator. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class TableSeparator extends TableCell { public function __construct(array $options = []) { parent::__construct('', $options); } }
